jei.caves_delight.axolotl_ham_info: If you want to gather this resoure you might need something lighter then a sword...
jei.caves_delight.chess_flower_info: These flowers typically are found in lush and flourishing caves. If you need more flowers, using a fertilizer might be usefull
jei.caves_delight.glow_lichen_info: Try to cut down glow lichen naturally found in some caves with a knife.
